name: Indeed
alertSteps: Run a search, then click "Get new jobs for this search by email" near the top of the results (or toggle Job Alert in the app) and set it to daily.

name: LinkedIn
note: Best for networking and recruiter visibility
alertSteps: Run a search, toggle "Set alert" at the top of the results list, choose Daily, and pick email or app notification.

name: Dice
note: Strong for IT contracts and posted rates
alertSteps: Run a search, click "Save Search" and turn on email alerts in account settings.

name: ZipRecruiter
note: Useful for salary benchmarks and alerts
alertSteps: Run a search, click "Get New Jobs Emailed to You" and confirm the email frequency.

name: Built In
note: Better for SaaS, product support, and startup support roles
